purpose: Conformance vectors for restraint-receipt-v1. A restraint receipt is the verifiable record produced when an agent receives a deny or defer verdict. Silence is not conformant — the accountability layer covers denied and deferred actions with the same fidelity as executed ones. restraint_receipt_ref = SHA-256(JCS({action_ref, decision_id, verdict, reason_code, timestamp_ms})). All five fields are required. Vectors RR-ACCEPT-003 through RR-REJECT-006 cover the content-addressed verifier path: a verifier MUST recompute restraint_receipt_ref from the preimage fields and verify it matches the value in the receipt — trusting the hash as presented is not conformant.

vectors.label: Denied verdict — all required fields present
vectors.description: An agent receives a deny verdict from a guardrail. It emits a restraint receipt with all five required fields. restraint_receipt_ref is recomputable from the preimage by any verifier. action_ref is carried forward unchanged from the pre-execution record.
vectors.note: action_ref matches the guardrail-provider-v1 fixture positive path — same action instance, deny path

vectors.label: Deferred verdict — all required fields present
vectors.description: An agent receives a defer verdict (action pending review). It emits a restraint receipt with verdict='deferred'. The receipt is conformant and restraint_receipt_ref is recomputable.
vectors.note: action_ref matches the guardrail-provider-v1 NEG-5 Stripe scenario — same action instance, deferred path

vectors.label: Content-addressed verifier path — extra envelope fields do not affect hash
vectors.description: A receipt carrying audit_checkpoints (additional metadata) is still conformant. The verifier recomputes restraint_receipt_ref from the five core preimage fields only — audit_checkpoints does not enter the preimage. The recomputed hash matches the presented value. This vector establishes that extra envelope fields are transparent to the content-addressed verifier path.
vectors.note: audit_checkpoints is an envelope-level field. It does not enter the restraint_receipt_ref preimage. A verifier recomputing from the five core fields obtains cf3f2a5a… regardless of what audit_checkpoints contains.

vectors.label: Missing decision_id — non-conformant
vectors.description: A restraint receipt is emitted without decision_id. The preimage is incomplete; restraint_receipt_ref is not recomputable by a verifier holding only the receipt. A conformant verifier MUST reject this receipt.
vectors.invariant_violated: decision_id is required — without it the preimage is incomplete and restraint_receipt_ref cannot be recomputed
vectors.verifier_outcome: REJECT — missing required field decision_id; receipt is non-conformant and restraint_receipt_ref cannot be verified

vectors.label: Tampered restraint_receipt_ref — verifier recompute detects mismatch
vectors.description: An attacker intercepts a conformant receipt and replaces the restraint_receipt_ref with a different value. The preimage fields are intact. A content-addressed verifier recomputes SHA-256(JCS(preimage)) from the five fields and obtains 03c00cc3… — which does not match the tampered value in the receipt. REJECT.
vectors.invariant_violated: restraint_receipt_ref in receipt does not match SHA-256(JCS(preimage)) recomputed by verifier — content-addressed verification fails
vectors.verifier_outcome: REJECT — recomputed hash 03c00cc3… does not match submitted hash deadbeef… — receipt has been tampered

vectors.label: Preimage field substitution — verdict changed, hash unchanged
vectors.description: An attacker modifies the verdict field from 'denied' to 'allow' in the submitted receipt, but leaves the restraint_receipt_ref unchanged (the original hash was computed from 'denied'). A content-addressed verifier recomputes SHA-256(JCS({…, verdict: 'allow', …})) and obtains 6d32c9ef… — which does not match 03c00cc3…. The substitution is detected structurally, without trusting any operator claim.
vectors.invariant_violated: verdict='allow' is not a valid restraint verdict (MUST be 'denied' or 'deferred'); additionally, recomputed hash from submitted preimage 6d32c9ef… does not match stated 03c00cc3…
vectors.verifier_outcome: REJECT — verdict 'allow' is non-conformant; recompute from submitted fields produces a different hash, confirming field substitution

vectors.label: Quiet drift — audit_checkpoints present but verifier surface not anchored
vectors.description: A receipt carries audit_checkpoints claiming a policy_bundle and verifier_id, but the restraint_receipt_ref was computed without anchoring those claims. The verifier surface that produced the deny/defer decision is declared in the envelope but unverifiable — a verifier cannot confirm which policy governed the decision from the receipt alone. This is the quiet-drift failure mode: the receipt appears complete but the verifier surface is floating.
vectors.invariant_violated: The verifier surface (policy_bundle, verifier_id) is declared in the envelope but is not anchored in the restraint_receipt_ref preimage. A verifier cannot prove which policy governed the decision. Per the restraint-receipt-v1 invariant: a terminal receipt cannot be interpreted independently from the verifier surface that produced the decision.
vectors.verifier_outcome: REJECT — audit_checkpoints declares a verifier surface that is not anchored in the five-field preimage; the policy binding cannot be verified from the receipt alone

vectors.label: policy_bundle digest mismatch — stated hash does not match presented bundle
vectors.description: A receipt's audit_checkpoints declares a policy_bundle hash. The verifier independently hashes the presented policy bundle and obtains sha256:c3fb74fc… — which does not match the stated sha256:000000…a. The policy binding claim in the receipt is false. A content-addressed verifier MUST reject.
vectors.invariant_violated: policy_bundle hash in audit_checkpoints (sha256:000000…a) does not match SHA-256(JCS(presented_bundle)) = sha256:c3fb74fc… — the policy binding claim is false
vectors.verifier_outcome: REJECT — policy_bundle digest mismatch; verifier recomputes actual bundle hash c3fb74fc… which does not match stated 000000…a

vectors.label: Verifier identity mismatch — audit_checkpoints verifier_id does not match decision record
vectors.description: A receipt's audit_checkpoints claims verifier_id='policy-verifier-01.mycelium.io', but the decision record referenced by decision_id was produced by 'guardrail-agent-v2.safeagent.io'. A verifier cross-checking the audit_checkpoints against the decision record detects the mismatch and MUST reject. This prevents receipt forgery by swapping verifier identity claims.
vectors.invariant_violated: audit_checkpoints.verifier_id ('policy-verifier-01.mycelium.io') does not match the verifier_id in the decision record ('guardrail-agent-v2.safeagent.io') — verifier identity claim is inconsistent with the decision record
vectors.verifier_outcome: REJECT — verifier_id in audit_checkpoints does not match decision record; receipt verifier identity cannot be confirmed
